backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor implementing the AI Media Studio backend with access control, user profiles, Replicate AI integration for image/video generation, Stripe payment handling, and gallery management.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping the frontend visual theme refresh (glassmorphism, dark gradients, amber/emerald/gold accents) to the affected files, components, and test IDs.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document containing one-line summaries of every frontend source file, serving as a quick reference for the purpose and contents of each component, page, hook, and config file.
frontend/index.css: Base Tailwind CSS entry point defining OKLCH CSS custom properties for light and dark theme color tokens used by shadcn-ui components.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for the React app titled 'AI Media Studio', loading Google Fonts and mounting the root React component via main.tsx.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that wraps the app in a forced dark ThemeProvider, sets up TanStack Router, and renders a styled Sonner toast container.
frontend/src/components/AccessDeniedScre: Full-page access denied screen with a red-tinted glassmorphism card, shield icon, and a back-to-home button for unauthorized admin route access.
frontend/src/components/GalleryCard.tsx: Gallery card component that renders an image or video preview with hover overlay, type badge, index badge, and an external link button.
frontend/src/components/GenerationTab.ts: Reusable generation tab with prompt input, up to 3 retry attempts, idempotency key per prompt, and logic to detect backend success returned as an ApiError URL variant.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: Main application layout component with a sticky header, desktop/mobile navigation links, authentication controls via Internet Identity, and a profile setup modal trigger for new users.
frontend/src/components/ProfileSetupModa: Modal dialog that prompts newly authenticated users to enter a display name and saves their profile using the `useSaveCallerUserProfile` mutation.
frontend/src/components/ProtectedRoute.t: Route guard component that shows a loading spinner while initializing, or a login prompt if unauthenticated, otherwise renders its children.
frontend/src/components/ReplicateConfigS: Settings UI component for entering and saving a Replicate API key, displaying its current configuration status with visual indicators.
frontend/src/components/StripeConfigSetu: Settings UI component for configuring Stripe payments by entering a secret key and managing an allowed-countries list; only renders when Stripe is not yet configured.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an authenticated or anonymous ICP backend actor using React Query, invalidating dependent queries whenever the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an `InternetIdentityProvider` context and `useInternetIdentity` hook that manage Internet Identity authentication state, including login, logout, and identity persistence via `AuthClient`.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for all backend interactions including user profile, credits, image/video generation, gallery, admin checks, user management, Stripe checkout, and Replicate/Stripe configuration.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet that imports fonts, configures Tailwind, defines CSS custom properties for a dark theme with oklch colors, and provides utility component classes like glassmorphism variants and gradient text.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider wrapping the root App component.
frontend/src/pages/AdminPage.tsx: Admin dashboard page with sidebar navigation showing overview stats, user table, and configuration sections for Replicate and Stripe; access is gated by an admin check.
frontend/src/pages/CreditsPage.tsx: Credits purchase page displaying three tiered credit bundles (Starter, Creator, Pro) with Stripe checkout integration triggered on bundle selection.
frontend/src/pages/GalleryPage.tsx: Protected gallery page that fetches and displays the user's generated media in a responsive grid, with loading skeletons and an empty state linking to the generate page.
frontend/src/pages/GeneratePage.tsx: A protected page with image/video tab switcher that renders the GenerationTab component, displays unlimited credits info, and provides prompt writing tips.
frontend/src/pages/IndexPage.tsx: The landing page showcasing features, stats, and a hero banner with login/CTA buttons for the AI media generation platform.
frontend/src/pages/PaymentFailurePage.ts: A full-screen error page shown after a failed payment, with links to retry on the credits page or return home.
frontend/src/pages/PaymentSuccessPage.ts: A confirmation page shown after successful payment that invalidates the credits query cache and links to the generate or gallery pages.
frontend/src/routeTree.ts: Defines the TanStack Router route tree, mapping URL paths to page components under a shared Layout root route.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for reading URL query parameters from both standard and hash-based routing, with sessionStorage persistence and hash cleanup helpers.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending the theme with custom amber/emerald/gold/surface color palettes, Space Grotesk/JetBrains Mono fonts, and custom shadows and border radii.
project_state.json: Tracks the overall project state, version, feature list, architectural notes, and known issues for a full-stack AI media generation app on the Internet Computer using Replicate API and Stripe payments.
